scripts.deploy:dev: doppler run --config dev -- wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.deploy:prod: doppler run --config prd -- wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.register-commands:dev: doppler run --config dev -- npx tsx scripts/register-commands.ts
scripts.register-commands:prod: doppler run --config prd -- npx tsx scripts/register-commands.ts
scripts.db:query:dev: doppler run --config dev -- wrangler d1 execute giddy-dev --env dev --remote --command
scripts.db:query:prod: doppler run --config prd -- wrangler d1 execute giddy --env production --remote --command
